```diff
--- a/backend/src/routes/newsRoutes.js
+++ b/backend/src/routes/newsRoutes.js
@@ -25 +25 @@

   const candidate = getBearerToken(req.headers.authorization) || String(req.headers['x-refresh-token'] || '').trim();

```
